items.title: Amazon's $1,149 15-inch MacBook Air deal is selling out, save up to $450 across line
items.summary: Apple's price increases have resulted in increased demand for Amazon's Prime Day deals, which remain unchanged. A top seller is this M5 15-inch MacBook Air for $1,149. Save $350 on Apple's 15-inch MacBook Air M5 while supplies last - Image...

items.title: Camp Snoopy season 2 now available on Apple TV
items.summary: All thirteen episodes from the second season of Camp Snoopy are now available on Apple TV. Watch the trailer below.

items.title: M6 MacBook Pro Expected This Year With Apple's First 2nm Chip
items.summary: Apple could launch an updated base model 14-inch MacBook Pro with an M6 chip as soon as this year, reports Bloomberg . There could also be M6 chip updates for the Mac mini , iMac , and MacBook Air , but Apple is testing an M6 ‌MacBook...

items.title: Micron exec suggests Apple's aggressive purchasing tactics helped fuel memory shortage
items.summary: In an interview with The Wall Street Journal following a blockbuster earnings report, Micron Chief Business Officer Sumit Sadana implied that Apple played a role in the current memory crunch. Here are the details.

items.title: WhatsApp channels are finally getting search on iPhone
items.summary: Nearly a year and a half after bringing channel update search to Android, WhatsApp is now rolling out the feature to iPhone users. Here's how it works.

items.title: Subaru's new top-selling EV delivers over 300 miles of range for just $35,000
items.summary: The Uncharted is now Subaru's most popular and most affordable EV in the US. Subaru announced that prices for the 2027 Uncharted EV will start at $35,000.

items.title: WEBINAR: Why Google Cloud NetApp Volumes Matter for Modern EDA Workloads
items.summary: In this webinar, Google Cloud and NetApp explore how semiconductor companies can address the growing infrastructure demands of modern Electronic Design Automation (EDA) workflows. As process technologies continue to advance and chip...

items.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build 'digital worlds' that stress-test AI agents
items.summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

items.title: Microsoft increases Xbox Series console prices for the third time in two years, kills off 2TB model - $100-$150 upswings on every model
items.summary: Microsoft increases Xbox Series console prices for the third time in two years - $100-$150 upswings on every model except the now-dead 2 TB version

items.title: Tangent's Spectrum II X5 bookshelf speakers go wireless while adding more ports
items.summary: Bluetooth, HDMI, USB-C, and optical are all on board.
